file.content:
name: Lexical Core Tests

on:
  workflow_call:

permissions: {}

jobs:
  integrity:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [24.x]
    env:
      CI: true
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm run ci-check
      - run: pnpm run build
      - run: pnpm run build-www
      - run: pnpm run --filter @lexical/website build
      - run: pnpm run --filter lexical-playground build-vercel

  unit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [22.x, 24.x]
    env:
      CI: true
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Install React ${{ matrix.override-react-version }}
        if: matrix.override-react-version != ''
        # This should be safe since we are caching pnpm store and not node_modules
        run: |
          node ./scripts/override-react.mjs --version=${{ matrix.override-react-version }}
          grep version node_modules/{react,react-dom}/package.json
      - run: pnpm run test-unit

name: Lexical Tests

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths-ignore:
      - 'examples/**'
      - 'packages/lexical-website/**'
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
  merge_group:

permissions: {}

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  core-tests:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/call-core-tests.yml

  e2e-tests:
    if: github.repository_owner == 'facebook'
    uses: ./.github/workflows/call-e2e-canary-tests.yml

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CI=true

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN npm install -g pnpm@10.33.0

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
